title: PLULON 2Pcs White Tablecloth Plastic Table Cover 137 x 274cm Rectangle Table Cover for Baby Shower Party Supplies Wedding Birthday Christmas Party Home Table Decorations
features: Package included: 2 x White plastic party table cover. Indoor or outdoor kids party table decorations
Size: 137 x 274 cm/54" x 108" rectangular white plastic tablecloth. If you need a larger size to use, you can put two or more together
Material: our party table cover is made of PEVA, so the product is thin and may be a bit transparent, if you mind, you can choose a dark color tablecloth

Plastic tablecloth is waterproof, spill-proof and easy to clean. These tablecloths are perfect for White themed party, birthday party, graduation party, baby shower party, barbecues, wedding, Easter party, Halloween party, Christmas party and other themed events
Kindly Reminder: The white plastic tablecloth is shipped folded, if you mind the crease, you can unfold and flatten it before your party
description: Product Description 137 x 274 cm/54" x 108" Rectangular Plastic Table Cover Plastic Tablecloth 137 x 274 cm/54" x 108" Rectangular Plastic Table Cover Our party table cover is made of PEVA, so the product is thin and may be a bit transparent, if you mind, you can choose a dark color tablecloth. The plastic party tablecloth is waterproof, oil-proof, spill-proof and easy to clean. These tablecloths are perfect for kids party, birthday party, graduation party, baby shower party, barbecues, wedding, Easter party, Halloween party, Christmas party and other themed events The video showcases the product in use.
